Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute at Chicago/Homan
ShortDescription: #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Chicago/Homan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Chicago, Homan, Augusta, Hamlin, Chicago and over normal route, due to police activity near Chicago/Homan. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 95th-bound Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: 95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Monroe. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Monroe.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
